stack_id.description: UUID of the stack whose persisted Terraform/Pulumi state should be searched. Use plrl_stacks to find stack IDs.

query.description: Case-sensitive fuzzy search text matched against each state resource's identifier, name, or resource type. Use concise terms such as a resource name, cloud resource identifier, or Terraform/Pulumi resource type.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of matching state resources to return. Defaults to 10; must be between 1 and 19.
